miner.PassiveDescription: +0.75% stone and ore mining speed per mastery rank (max 50).

Nodes.Description: A cleaner pickaxe motion lets you remove stone and ore faster.
Careful tool control gives each pickaxe more working life.
Careful extraction turns good ore readings into better recovery from ore blocks.
Experience underground teaches you how to survive dangerous drops and shafts.
Expert geological reading improves recovery from crystal-bearing stone.
Years below ground harden your body against the pressure of deep work.
The final miner mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive miner grandmaster recipe.

woodworker.PassiveDescription: +0.75% chopping speed against wood per mastery rank (max 50).

Nodes.Description: Strong axe control speeds up work on logs and wooden blocks.
Good maintenance reduces durability lost by axes.
Precise joinery sometimes produces an additional plank or wooden component.
Efficient cuts recover more material from log blocks.
Master joinery improves the output of storage and furniture work.
Hauling timber strengthens your stride and increases movement speed.
The final woodworker mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive woodworker grandmaster recipe.

farmer.PassiveDescription: +0.2% crop harvest yield per mastery rank (max +10%).

Nodes.Description: Healthy fields return more edible produce at harvest.
Practiced fieldwork reduces durability lost by hoes.
Careful seed handling returns more seeds from harvests.
Produce from your harvest provides more food saturation.
Knowledge of useful plants improves healing received.
Reliable food supplies reduce the rate at which hunger drains.
The final farmer mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive farmer grandmaster recipe.
Moving safely through active worksites increases your movement speed.
Experience on scaffolds and roofs reduces fall damage.
Efficient plans sometimes produce additional shaped building pieces.
Careful demolition recovers more stone and brick material.
Precise tool use reduces durability lost by chisels.
Heavy construction work increases your maximum health.
The final builder mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive builder grandmaster recipe.

blacksmith.PassiveDescription: -0.1% fire and heat damage per mastery rank (max -5%).

Nodes.Description: Efficient hammer work reduces durability lost by smithing hammers.
Constant work near furnaces reduces fire and heat damage.
Exceptional blade work has a chance to produce an additional forged blade component.
Understanding armor construction reduces incoming damage.
Mastery of weapon balance increases damage with forged melee weapons.
Years shaping protection increase your maximum health.
The final blacksmith mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive blacksmith grandmaster recipe.
Better meals provide more saturation when eaten.
Efficient meal planning reduces hunger drain.
Refined nutrition improves the healing you receive.
Large-batch cooking has a chance to create additional meal output.
A consistently excellent diet increases maximum health.
Years beside crowded ovens reduce fire and heat damage taken.
The final cook mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive cook grandmaster recipe.

potter.PassiveDescription: -0.1% fire and heat damage per mastery rank (max -5%).

Nodes.Description: Efficient forming sometimes produces an additional raw clay item.
Long exposure to kilns reduces fire and heat damage.
Fine ceramic work has a chance to create extra decorative pottery.
Kiln experience reduces hunger drain during long production sessions.
Master shaping improves output when producing storage vessels.
Extreme kiln work increases maximum health.
The final potter mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive potter grandmaster recipe.
Careful carcass work recovers more hides.
Controlled cutting reduces durability lost by knives.
Layered, fitted leather reduces projectile damage taken.
Efficient tanning has a chance to produce additional leather output.
Knowledge of fitted protective gear reduces incoming damage.
Hard physical hide work increases maximum health.
The final leatherworker mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive leatherworker grandmaster recipe.

tailor.PassiveDescription: -0.1% projectile damage taken per mastery rank (max -5%).

Nodes.Description: Layered clothing reduces fall damage taken.
Careful cutting reduces durability lost by shears.
Supportive fitted garments improve healing received.
Efficient weaving has a chance to produce additional cloth.
Reinforced fitted clothing reduces incoming damage.
Efficient clothing and bedding reduce hunger drain.
The final tailor mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive tailor grandmaster recipe.

hunter.PassiveDescription: +0.1% damage against animals per mastery rank (max +5%).

Nodes.Description: Long pursuits increase your movement speed.
Clean carcass work recovers more hides.
Sneaking reveals the direction of nearby animals within a larger radius.
Careful butchering recovers more meat from carcasses.
Tracking reports identify the animal and its approximate distance.
Knowledge of animal weak points increases damage dealt to animals.
The final hunter mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive hunter grandmaster recipe.

warrior.PassiveDescription: +0.5% one-handed melee damage per mastery rank (max 50).

Nodes.Description: Core weapon practice increases one-handed melee damage.
Controlled strikes reduce durability lost by melee weapons.
Duelist footwork reduces projectile damage taken.
When below 35% health, your weapon damage increases.
Defensive timing reduces incoming damage.
Hard combat experience increases maximum health.
The final warrior mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive warrior grandmaster recipe.

ranger.PassiveDescription: +0.5% bow, sling and crossbow damage per mastery rank (max 50).

Nodes.Description: Ranged practice increases damage with bows, crossbows, slings, arrows, and bolts.
Careful handling reduces durability lost by bows and crossbows.
Careful aim increases ranged critical-hit chance.
Constant repositioning reduces projectile damage taken.
Ranged critical hits deal additional damage.
Efficient fletching has a chance to produce additional arrows or bolts.
The final ranger mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive ranger grandmaster recipe.

fisher.PassiveDescription: +0.2% fish catch yield per mastery rank (max +10%).

Nodes.Description: Successful catches produce more fish.
Careful tackle use reduces durability lost by fishing equipment.
Fresh fish meals provide more saturation.
Efficient netcraft has a chance to produce additional net-related output.
A reliable fish diet reduces hunger drain.
Sure footing on wet banks reduces fall damage taken.
The final fisher mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive fisher grandmaster recipe.

animalhusbandry.PassiveDescription: -0.1% damage taken from animals per mastery rank (max -5%).

Nodes.Description: Experience around animals reduces damage received from animals.
Careful milking increases milk yield.
Knowledge of animal products helps you get more nourishment from food.
Careful flock work reduces durability lost by shears.
Knowledge of animal health improves healing received.
Years managing large animals increase maximum health.
The final animal husbandry mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive animal husbandry grandmaster recipe.

beekeeper.PassiveDescription: -0.2% bee and wasp damage per mastery rank (max -10%).

Nodes.Description: Apiary experience reduces damage received from bees and similar insects.
Regular apiary work reduces hunger drain.
Careful hive work recovers more honeycomb and honey.
Honey-rich food provides more saturation.
Knowledge of honey and remedies improves healing received.
Efficient routes between hives increase your movement speed.
The final beekeeper mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive beekeeper grandmaster recipe.

spearman.PassiveDescription: +0.5% melee and thrown-spear damage per mastery rank (max 50).

Nodes.Description: Polearm practice increases spear and javelin damage.
Controlled thrusts reduce durability lost by spears.
A braced lancer stance reduces projectile damage taken.
Knowledge of animal anatomy increases damage dealt to animals.
Mastered spacing and bracing reduce all incoming damage.
When below 35% health, spear damage increases.
The final spearman mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive spearman grandmaster recipe.

shield.PassiveDescription: -0.1% damage while holding a shield per mastery rank (max -5%).

Nodes.Description: Defensive conditioning increases maximum health.
Holding a shield reduces incoming damage.

Effects.Stat: Damage taken while holding a shield

Nodes.Description: Protective discipline improves healing received.
A reinforced stance reduces all incoming damage.
Shield awareness reduces projectile damage.
Below 35% health, incoming damage is reduced further.
The final shield mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive shield grandmaster recipe.

tank.PassiveDescription: +0.1 maximum health per mastery rank (max +5 HP).

Nodes.Description: Hard conditioning increases maximum health.
General toughness reduces incoming damage.
Heat, fire, and burning deal less damage.
A Juggernaut keeps advancing under missile fire, reducing projectile damage taken.
Recovery training improves all healing received.
Below 35% health, incoming damage is reduced further.
The final tank mastery reward. Unlocks the exclusive tank grandmaster recipe.
